analysis_lanes.purpose: Detect repeated structures across normalized records and review packets.
Detect structured absence, silence, undercoverage, and asymmetric source presence.
Apply bounded mathematical summaries to normalized metadata and packet structures.
Model second-order or conditional structure: where a pattern appears only under a secondary condition such as source type, category, region, timing, or uncertainty label.
Translate bounded structural findings into real-world review suggestions.

claim_boundary: Phase 9 registration only. This does not claim production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, agreement detection, causal inference, prediction, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution.
phase9_goal: Define the analytical core workplan for pattern detection, negative-space analysis, advanced math overlay, secondary-condition overlay, and bounded real-world suggestion scaffolds without claiming truth, causality, prediction, alerts, or autonomous action.
purpose: Upgrade the terminal from bounded information intake and review packet indexing into bounded structural analysis scaffolding.
required_gates: Gate 1: load only Phase 4, Phase 5, Phase 6, Phase 7, and Phase 8 bounded artifacts
Gate 2: preserve provenance and claim boundaries
Gate 3: keep all pattern outputs at candidate/review tier
Gate 4: separate observed metadata from interpretation
Gate 5: label negative-space outputs as absence/coverage candidates only
Gate 6: keep math overlays descriptive unless separately validated
Gate 7: real-world suggestions must be bounded review suggestions, not action instructions
Gate 8: no production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, alert readiness, autonomous action, causal certainty, or truth resolution
